data.title: Pyth Network to facilitate outcome determinations for Kalshi's commodities expansion using Pyth's pricing data. Expanding into oil, gold, and crops.
data.description: Utilizing Pyth’s pricing data, the forecast platform will facilitate trade settlements on its recently launched commodities markets. These markets extend to assets such as oil, gold, and crops, marking a significant expansion for the platform.

data.title: AT&T Falls On Wireless Subscriber 'Churn' Worries. T-Mobile Drops On Deutsche Telekom.
data.description: AT&T exceeded first-quarter earnings expectations, with revenue meeting estimates. The company saw significant growth in wireless postpaid phone subscribers, surpassing forecasts. However, AT&T stock dropped due to concerns over wireless subscriber turnover. Concurrently, T-Mobile shares fell following news related to Deutsche Telekom.

data.title: Public Knowledge® Strengthens Public Procurement Impact Through Acquisition of Civic Initiatives
data.description: Public Knowledge® has recently announced its acquisition of Civic Initiatives in Lakewood, New Jersey. This move, occurring on April 22, 2026, aims to enhance procurement expertise and assist public sector agencies in achieving faster and more effective outcomes while minimizing risks. By joining forces, the two companies are set to boost their capabilities in this regard.

data.title: Columbia Orthopaedic Group Signs Partnership with Remission Medical to Offer Virtual Rheumatology Care
data.description: In a press release dated April 22, 2026, it was revealed that Columbia Orthopaedic Group and Remission Medical, Inc. of Richmond, Virginia have formed a strategic partnership. This collaboration, which pairs Columbia Orthopaedic Group with the virtual rheumatology company Remission Medical, Inc., seeks to address the issue of excessive wait times for specialized medical care. By working together, the two entities aim to streamline access to embedded specialty care for patients. This partnership marks a significant step towards improving healthcare services and reducing waiting periods for individuals in need of specialized medical attention.

data.title: New RTI Study: More Medicaid Patients Received Opioid Use Disorder Treatment Medications in US
data.description: A recent study conducted by independent scientific researchers revealed a significant rise in access to medications for opioid use disorder (OUD) among Medicaid beneficiaries in almost every state in the U.S. from 2019 to 2023. The research, based in Research Triangle Park, N.C., highlights the increase in availability of these crucial medications to combat OUD, showing positive progress in addressing this widespread issue. The findings indicate a noteworthy improvement in providing necessary treatment to individuals struggling with OUD, underscoring a promising development in healthcare services for those in need.

data.title: Elon Musk suggests new goals as SpaceX gears up for IPO, shifting focus from Mars to other ambitious missions.
data.description: With SpaceX's upcoming public debut, Elon Musk has suggested new ambitious goals, deviating from the company's initial focus on Mars exploration.

data.title: Two experimental drugs show promise for pancreatic cancer, offering hope to patients in two small clinical trials.
data.description: In recent small clinical trials, two different treatments have demonstrated potential in aiding patients facing one of the most serious diagnoses in cancer care. The trials yielded encouraging results, suggesting these treatments could provide assistance to individuals grappling with this challenging condition.

data.title: Cursor to acquire SpaceX in a $60B deal as Elon Musk's firm gears up for IPO, focusing on AI tech.
data.description: In light of an anticipated takeover, the company led by entrepreneur Elon Musk, known for its focus on artificial intelligence, is gearing up for its initial public offering.

data.title: Gates Foundation is reviewing its connections with Epstein following the release of files featuring Bill Gates and advisers.
data.description: Following the release of the Epstein files, Bill Gates and several former advisers have been highlighted significantly.
Artificial intelligence is causing job cuts on Wall Street, with over 20,000 positions expected to be eliminated.

data.title: Strait of Hormuz's significance diminishes as energy industry plans for a future without it.
data.description: The energy sector is strategizing for a future where the critical location on Iran’s southern coast will have diminished significance. This shift in focus indicates a move towards alternative energy sources and technologies.

data.title: GRAND CANYON UNIVERSITY SENDS RECORD 33,251 GRADUATES INTO THE MARKETPLACE, BOOSTING HIGH-NEED PROFESSIONS NATIONWIDE
data.description: Grand Canyon University is set to honor a remarkable graduating class totaling 33,251 students during the academic year 2025-26. This achievement highlights the university's focus on innovative delivery platforms tailored to address the evolving demands of the workforce. The substantial number of graduates underscores Grand Canyon University's commitment to providing quality education that aligns with industry requirements.
Company repurchased 10,000 of its own shares at $50 each. Total cost was $500,000.

data.title: Robinhood's $75M investment in OpenAI to allow retail investors to access venture tokens and benefit from indirect price exposure.
data.description: A significant private equity investment has been allocated to allow retail customers to access indirect price exposure to OpenAI through venture tokens.

data.title: Coloplast A/S - H1 2025/26 Earnings Release - Invitation for conference call on 12 May 2026 at 11:00 CEST
data.description: On Tuesday, 12 May 2026 from 11:00 to 12:00 CEST, Coloplast will conduct a conference call regarding their interim financial results for H1 2025/26. The results will be disclosed around 07:30 CEST on the same day. The call aims to present the financial figures and address queries from investors and analysts. A presentation will be uploaded on Coloplast’s website roughly 1 hour before the call. The webcast of the conference will be accessible both during and after the event.
